steps: Register a web app in Microsoft Entra ID.
Grant it Partner Center API permissions and admin consent.
app-only.supportedNote: Not all operations support app-only; check each scenario's authType. Native apps support app+user only.

steps: Use the secure application model (refresh-token based).
Acquire a user token, then exchange it for a Partner Center token with resource https://api.partnercenter.microsoft.com.

mfa.note: From 2026-04-01 all App+User usage of Partner Center APIs enforces MFA. From October 2025 the API confirms presence of the MFA claim.

deprecations.fix: Use the Partner Center REST APIs directly.
